headline: Can Sustained Product Momentum Drive BDX Stock Before Q2 Earnings?
summary: BD rides on Medical and Interventional product momentum, but China dynamics and research funding could weigh on second-quarter fiscal 2026 results.

headline: Countdown to McKesson (MCK) Q4 Earnings: A Look at Estimates Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for McKesson (MCK), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: DEI Programs Are Dwindling But the Trump Administration Isn't Done
